program progress note for the validate_redirects shell retirement

claims: The WPHX-312.57 WP_Http::validate_redirects candidate now uses the WPHX compiler-emitted grouped original-path class-wp-http.php public shell.

The generated shell preserves the public static validate_redirects($location) ABI, keeps wp_http_validate_url, translation, and Requests exception construction in PHP, and delegates the bounded reject decision to the Haxe helper.
The previous copied or runner-patched temporary public PHP shell is no longer the authority for the validate_redirects boundary.
non_claims: This receipt does not claim whole-file WP_Http ownership.

This receipt does not claim WP_Http::request ownership, live HTTP transport behavior, installed WordPress distribution behavior, absolute URL resolution, redirect following, broader redirect helper ownership, or generated Requests ownership.
